law: Read-only evaluation from hub registries and committed report JSON only. No deploy, no external mutation, no arbitrary disk walks, no secrets, no auto-fix. Percentages and deployment_status are advisory posture — not certification. Production-ready band (96–100) still requires explicit human / legal / security gates.

rollups.automated_readiness_cap_note: This overseer never emits 96–100 from formulas alone — that band is reserved for human-signed receipts outside this script.
